message.content:
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

package "tictactoe" {
  package "controllers" {

    class Controller {
      +Controller(Game)
      +getToken(Coordinate): Token
    }

    class Logic {
      +Logic()
      +getMaxPlayers(): int
      +setUsers(int)
      +getToken(): Token
      +next()
      +isBoardComplete(): boolean
      +isTicTacToe(): boolean
      +isUser(): boolean
      +put(Coordinate): Error
      +move(Coordinate, Coordinate): Error
      +getToken(Coordinate): Token
      +resume()
    }

    class StartController {
      +StartController(Game)
      +setUsers(int)
      +getMaxPlayers(): int
    }

    class ResumeController {
      +ResumeController(Game)
      +resume()
    }

    class PlayController {
      +PlayController(Game)
      +isBoardComplete(): boolean
      +isTicTacToe(): boolean
      +getToken(): Token
      +isUser(): boolean
      +put(Coordinate): Error
      +move(Coordinate,Coordinate): Error
    }

    Controller <|-- StartController
    Controller <|-- ResumeController
    Controller <|-- PlayController

    Controller *-- Logic
    StartController *-- Logic
    ResumeController *-- Logic
    PlayController *-- Logic
  }

  class "usantatecla.tictactoe.models.\nGame" as Game
  class "usantatecla.tictactoe.models.\nCoordinate" as Coordinate
  class "usantatecla.tictactoe.types.\nError" as Error
  class "usantatecla.tictactoe.types.\nToken" as Token

  controllers.Controller ..> Game
  controllers.StartController ..> Game
  controllers.ResumeController ..> Game
  controllers.PlayController ..> Game

  controllers.Controller ..> Coordinate
  controllers.Logic ..> Coordinate
  controllers.PlayController ..> Coordinate

  controllers.Logic ..> Error
  controllers.PlayController ..> Error

  controllers.Logic ..> Token
  controllers.Controller ..> Token
  controllers.PlayController ..> Token
}
@enduml
